title: rouliniella racemosa
intro: Rouliniella racemosa, also known as the "clustered rouliniella," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Rouliniella racemosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Rouliniella racemosa typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
